classification.explanation: target log10 RMSE = 0.2633500276766559; eligible log10 RMSE = 0.15817019267448623; adverse control = per_class_median (log10 RMSE = 0.23767045104757828); margin = 0.022.

adverse_nearest_radius_outside_slice.interpretation: Adverse-negative control: nearest-radius matched cohort drawn strictly from outside-slice rows. If residual stress is radius-position driven (not slice-driven), this cohort should rise toward the target RMSE.
adverse_nearest_radius_outside_slice.label: adverse_nearest_radius_outside_slice

detection_method_outside_slice.interpretation: Outside-slice eligible rows sharing each target row's detection_method, broken by nearest log mass; controls for discovery-pipeline selection effects.
detection_method_outside_slice.label: detection_method_outside_slice

host_temperature_outside_slice.interpretation: Outside-slice eligible rows greedily matched to each target row's host effective temperature; controls for host-context selection effects. Targets without host Teff are excluded.
host_temperature_outside_slice.label: host_temperature_outside_slice

nearest_radius_outside_slice.interpretation: Outside-slice eligible rows greedily matched to each target row's radius; tests whether the residual stress is driven by radius position rather than slice membership.
nearest_radius_outside_slice.label: nearest_radius_outside_slice

per_class_median.interpretation: Per-class median residual shift on the target rows; controls for CK17 mass-class bias but is not an independent row slice.
per_class_median.label: per_class_median

sample_size_random_outside.interpretation: Deterministic seeded random sample of the same size drawn from outside-slice eligible rows; expected to sit near the eligible RMSE by construction.
sample_size_random_outside.label: sample_size_random_outside

shuffled_radius_label.interpretation: Each target's radius is replaced by a deterministically shuffled radius drawn from the eligible pool; residual is recomputed. Tests whether the signal is mass-position driven independent of the true radius assignment.
shuffled_radius_label.label: shuffled_radius_label

uncertainty_band_outside_slice.interpretation: Outside-slice eligible rows sharing each target row's combined mass/radius uncertainty band, broken by nearest log mass; controls for measurement-quality selection.
uncertainty_band_outside_slice.label: uncertainty_band_outside_slice

uncertainty_equalized_subset.interpretation: Target subset restricted to combined relative uncertainty <= 15%; tests whether residual stress collapses when only tight-uncertainty rows are kept.
uncertainty_equalized_subset.label: uncertainty_equalized_subset

target_slices.description: Compact true-mass/transit-radius rows with R/Re < 1.5; tests whether the pilot residual stress survives matched and negative controls.
target_slices.label: compact_radius_lt1p5Re
